task_completion.description: Retrieve the list of cameras and their IDs from the Nx Witness API
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output, script execution, or API client showing a GET request to the Nx Witness API (e.g., /rest/v1/devices) to retrieve the list of cameras and their dynamically generated UUIDs.

task_completion.description: Configure the Entrance, Server Room, and Loading Dock cameras
task_completion.visual_evidence: API requests (via curl, Python script, or API client) sending PATCH/PUT requests to modify the Entrance Camera, Server Room Camera, and Loading Dock Camera. The payloads must set 'motionType' to 'software' and update the recording schedule to 'motionOnly'.

task_completion.description: Ensure Parking Lot and Lobby cameras remain unchanged
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent's script logic or manual commands explicitly skip or do not send modification requests for the Parking Lot Camera and Lobby Camera.

task_completion.description: Create the JSON configuration report at the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A command (e.g., redirecting output) or script writing the final configuration state to the file /home/ga/motion_detection_config.json.

task_completion.description: Verify the contents of the generated JSON report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of /home/ga/motion_detection_config.json displayed on screen (e.g., via 'cat' or a text editor). It must be valid JSON with 'generated_by': 'agent' and a 'cameras' array containing 5 objects. The 3 target cameras must show 'motionType': 'software' and 'recordingType': 'motionOnly'. The 2 ignored cameras must show 'motionType': 'default' and 'recordingType': 'always'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the Nx Witness API
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual HTTP requests (curl, Python requests, etc.) sent to https://localhost:7001 to configure the cameras, rather than the agent just generating a fake JSON report without making system changes.

integrity.description: Verify camera UUIDs were fetched dynamically
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must extract the real camera UUIDs from the API response and include them in the JSON report, rather than hardcoding fake or placeholder UUIDs.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON report was actually saved to the file system
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the file was written to disk at /home/ga/motion_detection_config.json (e.g., using a file write operation in a script or a shell redirection), not just printed to the console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Nx Witness VMS API is at https://localhost:7001. Credentials: admin / Admin1234!. Target cameras: 'Entrance Camera', 'Server Room Camera', 'Loading Dock Camera' (must be configured with motionType='software' and recordingType='motionOnly'). Ignored cameras: 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Lobby Camera' (must remain unchanged with motionType='default' and recordingType='always'). The final JSON report must be saved at /home/ga/motion_detection_config.json and include all 5 cameras with their real UUIDs.
